textByHashes.42b99a341df966371aca7c984271dce3e4542f60: Sorry, don't have time to chat! Something's up with the ship, I'm trying to find out what!
textByHashes.5134858b4670460709ff847cbb84d88e6abd81f6: His fault, eh? Well, I never liked him much anyway.
textByHashes.b244f4d38e9801c58cd3b5b019d4fe640c509bc5: Ah yes, those were the days!
textByHashes.bf18af1ce64f01670adf6af0ebd05ab228878704: Oh, like you wouldn't believe... The food... The wine... The women... The songs...
textByHashes.2308903ea30edc54119337a65035beb423ddbb91: It was everything any honest pirate could ever hope for!
textByHashes.3f512471878344b72cbfa181ba0a4e26c23ce802: Well, we weren't all there. The Captain was at the high table, and the Bosun didn't trust their food and stayed on ship.
textByHashes.8ced61dc79538a32cc5a2341df961cf0321ac53c: It would indeed, because I saw him there with my own eyes!
textByHashes.b3f633d148eb8239ee35c59b117f4f3ab23271f2: Really? Well, I guess he could have, I wasn't watching him all night...
textByHashes.ab65932aea7f78643d99ae6e496ebd1ed0c466f6: Why... That's odd, he was here a minute ago!
textByHashes.42507ffa184cd5c81fcc2e478e999bf791e08b24: What do you mean 'how's things'? Here we are going in circles waiting for you to sort out this jinx, and you ask 'how's things'?
textByHashes.9def6b10edbb620d4afcbe31af19a417a854ce05: That's a strange question. I'ts not too bad I suppose. Sure, the pay is good, but the hours are long and we don't get many holidays.
textByHashes.43ca1cf806e3a87609398ab8fac8b86ec086859a: A pirates union? No, they would stab us in the back at the first opportunity.
textByHashes.2b6710f4e60e04397b6d1850009c5cabb3caf267: You assume I have a family?
textByHashes.a60c7c1c88ba423f2f58a8d9e6618147cd066806: I do. 16 kids, 12 nephews and 18 nieces.
textByHashes.9350d806da7a26d0cfdd5fd9b7e6d8203b9462dd: I wouldn't, she never cooks my dinner when I get home.
textByHashes.04f7a5ecfe85778dcbda70b07cbd238cf9972b3c: What kind of question is that? How's life as a... I dunno. Whatever it is that you do for a living.
textByHashes.c8f69b720759c2c4ea0d7b6c6ac7ac8f8c514d87: My mother was a gnome. Apparently it was a very painful birth.
textByHashes.7040b1266e80a64cf9d4b950ebd8a9a23809724b: Sorry, can't stop, the Captain will have my guts for garters if he catches me slacking off talking to the stowaway.
textByHashes.e42a3759ad234c8016911142aa65f11c19f57079: Yeah, whatever guy, it doesn't really matter who you are I'll get in trouble!
textByHashes.d0548e996177d869e39fea691eb982916dbe0d4a: Yeah, whatever lady, it doesn't really matter who you are I'll get in trouble!
textByHashes.f565bdb51a59c1e3566c79fb2989067e98fe92eb: Well, at the moment it mostly involves being asked random questions by a stowaway.
textByHashes.55637017e3f98a5ad78a9312b4e792775d725c9f: Hey, whatever love. Just make sure the captain doesn't catch you, pirates don't like stowaways much.
textByHashes.d671e6898f88b9d589997775679421126cef08c2: Hey, whatever pal. Just make sure the captain doesn't catch you, pirates don't like stowaways much.
textByHashes.9d6001e91d0a06ab9a3c1372fb9f8de816c1811b: Ah, good day to you milady! Your face is unfamiliar, did you perhaps join us aboard the ship at Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.e9ee9e84be3d6ae50c289bfb7e6ce30774cff896: Ah, good day to you sirrah! Your face is unfamiliar, did you perhaps join us aboard the ship at Lunar Isle?
textByHashes.e986059cf8c5c59f0f2650fa9fea23d628c5576c: Oh, really? You don't look like a Fremennik to me!
textByHashes.5bf93afa985392b4e63b4e4a9382cd90a14416d4: Sorry I don't have time to hear it then! See you around young fremennik-who-is-not-really-a-fremennik!
textByHashes.21c3d15292c5440d3ce726173b8a1ece1210f391: You think this is cold? Up by Acheron it gets so cold that when you talk you see the words freeze in the air in front of you!
textByHashes.2de1b96110c164ed01c49cf95fadb37eb1faf077: Nah, not really. I was exaggerating for humourous effect. It is very very cold though!
textByHashes.d677943a4a6a209b2513cc895ea2ad50f572e11b: Please don't talk like that, it is extremely irritating.
textByHashes.48147eea30e02a654437ab28713f74ef9d46484f: Also, please don't call me a lychee, whatever that may be.
textByHashes.925680d51236db1c3f874c829ab67dbdb784b99c: ARGH! SOUND THE ALARM! STOWAWAY ON BOARD! STOWAWAY ON BOARD!
textByHashes.d69a3bdc5c2414fccbb7789e7018bbc7a0e9abe9: You must admit you do look a lot like a stowaway though.
textByHashes.f4a1bd3f94f77a4f62d714ac1c2e572a1a87de59: Erm... I've never actually met one...
textByHashes.82a258264e113035287831626c8f19d2c0c020b1: It's what it says on my pay-packet at the end of the month.
textByHashes.bb5f36a76d9b18db36d0875d1ae9fd85c1d592dc: Pretty good so far. All the grog and loot that we can plunder, plus full medical including dental.
textByHashes.2d1e03e96a3a5c452151fa39733f4da632b47190: Not as such. If any of us get sick we kidnap a doctor and don't let him go until we're better.
textByHashes.18c9d6d82d4df92b4ef0724fd4d75902c1050840: You'd be surprised what an incentive for expert health care that is.
textByHashes.3e1aa65a947966d83595c594e4ed61b5e5809f10: Hello there. So what brings you aboard the Lady Zay?
textByHashes.497e48a27257c885ea01263a9535ad842e67b081: Aye, she's a beauty alright! The Lady Zay has been my home for many hard months, through storm and sun, and she always gets us to here we were headed!
textByHashes.2f06f96f5b0a491419a329ecb96c14c29bb780c5: That she is lad, that she is.
textByHashes.6a215f74a64976e8a3582ffce403af6b07cd645a: That she is lass, that she is.
